form.formComment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a 5 length third over 450m this track in 25.67. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.97) at Ballarat in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.97) at Ballarat in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks one of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell turning out of front straight.

form.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a eighth over 500m at Bendigo. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a eighth over 500m at Bendigo. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (25.48) at this track over 450m. Well-performed from this draw. Key chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (25.48) at this track over 450m. Well-performed from this draw. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Won again and recorded an impressive time after running them ragged to make it two in a row at Warragul over 460m (25.98). Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again and recorded an impressive time after running them ragged to make it two in a row at Warragul over 460m (25.98). Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at Geelong over 460m (26.12) beating Did So in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 14. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at Geelong over 460m (26.12) beating Did So in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 14. Likely to struggle this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (22.08) at big odds over 390m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and prefer the place this line-up.

form.formComment: Finished eighth last start at Geelong but prior to that had been racing consistently. Boxed out wide and prefer the place this line-up.
